allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\(''freed_reader.py'', encoding=''utf-8''\).read\(\)\); print\(''Syntax OK''\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetUDPEndpoint | Where-Object {$_OwningProcess -eq 45688} | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort | Sort-Object LocalPort")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name LiveLinkHub -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id; netstat -ano -p udp | Select-String ''45688''")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name LiveLinkHub -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \(''LiveLinkHub PID: '' + $_Id\) }; netstat -ano | findstr /R ''UDP'' | findstr ''45000\\|40000\\|6000\\|6666\\|6667''")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id \(netstat -ano -p udp | Select-String ''''40000'''' | ForEach-Object { \($_split ''''\\s+''''\)[-1] } | Select-Object -Unique\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName")
